brand.name: Al Hewal
brand.tagline: We build quality... and shape the future

hero.headline: We build quality... and shape the future
hero.subheadline: Al Hewal: a leader in Saudi real-estate development and investment, crafting residential excellence with a full one-year maintenance warranty.

valueProps.sectionHeadline: Solid engineering. Absolute commitment. Enduring trust.

engineering.title: Modern, high-quality engineering
engineering.body: We design and execute every project to the latest engineering standards with premium finishes and high-quality materials, matched to the ambitions of the market.

deadlines.title: Commitment to deadlines and precise execution
deadlines.body: We honour each project's schedule with disciplined construction management that delivers on time without compromising quality.

maintenance.title: One-year warranty and maintenance
maintenance.body: Every Al Hewal project ships with a full warranty on the workmanship and a free maintenance service for a full year post-handover.

featured.headline: Our Featured Projects
featured.empty: We're launching new projects shortly. Contact us about what's available now.

trustBanner.headline: Full one-year maintenance warranty
trustBanner.body: Our confidence in our work shows in our guarantees. Every Al Hewal project comes with a full warranty on the workmanship and one year of post-sale maintenance service.

filter.searchPlaceholder: Search by project name or district

results.empty: No properties match the current filters. Try widening your search.
results.emptyNoFilters: No properties listed yet. Contact us about what's available soon.

contact.title: Schedule a Viewing
contact.body: Speak with our sales advisors about {title}. Replies usually within an hour during business hours.
contact.messageTemplate: Hello Al Hewal, I'd like more information about {title} ({url}).

about.pageTitle: Saudi real estate, built with discipline.
about.pageDescription: Al Hewal Real Estate Development & Investment Company is a Saudi developer specialising in buying, developing, and investing in land and buildings to the highest standards of quality and craftsmanship — delivering modern residential and investment projects that match the ambitions of our clients and the Saudi market.
about.missionBody: Integrated developments — villas, duplexes, apartments, and investment buildings — designed and executed with meticulous attention to detail. Premium materials, modern engineering standards, and finishes that age well.
about.trustBody: Client trust is the foundation of our work. Every Al Hewal project ships with full warranties on the workmanship and one year of post-handover maintenance — so the quality stays in place long after the keys change hands.

values.relationships: Long-term client relationships built on trust

about.ctaTitle: Ready to discuss your next home?
about.ctaBody: Browse the current catalog or reach our sales team directly via WhatsApp.

contact.pageDescription: Tell us what you're looking for — investment, family home, or a specific district — and our sales advisors will reach out. Most enquiries get a reply within one business hour.
contact.directBody: Prefer instant reply? Tap WhatsApp for a one-tap chat in Arabic or English.

fields.inquiryTypeMaintenanceHint: Issue with a delivered unit (post-handover service)
fields.name: Your name
fields.messagePlaceholder: Tell us a bit about what you're looking for…
fields.messageMaintenancePlaceholder: Project / building / unit number, and what needs attention…

contact.successBody: Thank you. A sales advisor will reach out shortly.
contact.successBodyMaintenance: Thank you. Our maintenance team will be in touch to schedule a visit.

errors.invalid_phone: Please enter a valid Saudi phone number (05XXXXXXXX) or an international number with country code.
errors.rate_limited: You've sent several messages recently. Please wait a minute before trying again.
errors.server_error: Something went wrong on our side. Please WhatsApp us instead — link above.
errors.network_error: Connection problem. Check your internet and try again.

ar.title: هذه الصفحة لم نعد ننشرها
ar.body: ربما تم نقل العقار، أو لم يعد الرابط صالحاً. تصفح المشاريع المتاحة أو تواصل معنا للاستفسار.

en.title: This page isn't available
en.body: The property may have moved, or the link is no longer valid. Browse the current catalog or get in touch.

footer.tagline: We build quality... and shape the future
footer.about: Al Hewal Real Estate Development and Investment Company — a Saudi developer crafting residential and investment projects to the highest quality standards, backed by a full one-year maintenance warranty.
footer.rights: © {year} Al Hewal Real Estate Development & Investment Company. All rights reserved.

empty.title: No properties yet
empty.body: Once you add your first property, it will appear here with full filter, search, and edit controls. Drafts and archived rows are also visible to admins.

form.newSubtitle: Fields marked with an asterisk are required. The slug is generated from the English title if you leave it blank.

errors.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.invalid_json: We couldn't read the form payload. Please try again.
errors.invalid_body: Please correct the highlighted fields and submit again.
errors.invalid_slug: The URL slug is invalid — leave it blank to auto-generate one.
errors.no_changes: No changes detected. Edit a field before submitting.
errors.slug_taken: Another property already uses this URL slug. Pick a different one.
errors.insert_failed: We couldn't create the property. Try again or contact support.
errors.update_failed: We couldn't save the changes. Try again or contact support.
errors.network_error: Connection problem. Check your internet and try again.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: At-a-glance overview of your Command Center session.
dashboard.body: Use the sidebar to manage listings, review leads, and check analytics. The dashboard will grow into a real KPI surface in Phase 4.

properties.title: Listing Management
properties.subtitle: Review, add, and update Al Hewal residential projects.
properties.placeholder: The full listings table — with server-side pagination, status filters, and the add/edit property wizard — lands in PR 3.3. Until then, properties are seeded locally and the public catalog reads them in read-only mode.

leads.title: Leads Journal
leads.subtitle: Inbound contact attempts from WhatsApp, the contact form, and call clicks.
leads.placeholder: The chronological timeline with per-property filter, mark-contacted, and the bilingual PDF export ships in PR 3.6. Today every submission still lands in Supabase tagged with its source and inquiry_type — view in Supabase Studio meanwhile.

analytics.title: Strategic Analytics
analytics.subtitle: KPI cards, lead-velocity trend, hottest properties, and KSA region heatmap.
analytics.placeholder: Analytics dashboards ship in Phase 4 once the materialised views in migration 0003_views.sql are populated by real admin activity. The page_views and whatsapp_clicks tables already feed those views.

admins.title: Admin Management
admins.subtitle: Invite, promote, and deactivate administrators (super-admin only).
admins.placeholder: The invite + tier-management UI ships in PR 3.4. Today the first super-admin is bootstrapped manually via SQL — see docs/PHASE_3_RUNBOOK.md §1.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Identity, language preference, and account security.
profile.placeholder: The full profile editor + TOTP enrolment for super-admins lands in Phase 4. Today, language preference can be changed by re-running the bootstrap SQL with a different language_pref value.

login.title: Admin sign-in
login.intro: Enter your administrator email. We'll send you a one-time sign-in link — no password required.
login.sentBody: If {email} is registered as an Al Hewal administrator, a sign-in link is on its way. The link expires in one hour.

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a minute and try again.
errors.supabase: We couldn't send the link right now. Please try again in a moment.
errors.notAdmin: This email isn't registered as an Al Hewal administrator. Contact your super admin if this is unexpected.
errors.callbackInvalid: That sign-in link is no longer valid. Please request a new one.
errors.callbackExpired: That sign-in link has expired. Please request a new one.
